title: coffea ebracteolata
intro: Coffea ebracteolata, also known as the African coffee plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Coffea ebracteolata include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
